_meta.description: D6 fixtures for mastra / a2ui-recovery (A2UI error recovery). Backend-owned A2UI (a2uiRecoveryAgent, getA2UITools, injectA2UITool=false) with the toolkit validate->retry loop made visible. NO `context` match field: a real browser (the dojo) does NOT send x-aimock-context (only the harness does), and the inner render_a2ui sub-agent calls carry NO context header at all, so context-scoped fixtures would 404 / collide. The two pills' prompts are UNIQUE per framework (no substring overlap), so userMessage alone disambiguates across frameworks. Flow per pill: outer generate_a2ui emit (userMessage, tool-less — matched last); inner render_a2ui (userMessage+toolName+sequenceIndex; listed first so they win for the inner calls); outer narration (unique toolCallId of the emit). HEAL: attempt 1 (seq 0) invalid (dangling child) -> retry -> attempt 2 (seq 1) valid -> paints (Column + 2 Metric). EXHAUST: invalid every attempt -> recovery exhausts -> a2ui_recovery_exhausted.

fixtures._comment: HEAL - inner render_a2ui attempt 1 (sequenceIndex 0): structurally INVALID (root references a missing child) -> validate->retry rejects it.
HEAL - inner render_a2ui attempt 2 (sequenceIndex 1): VALID surface (Column + two Metric tiles; Mastra Metric props = label/value/trend, no trendValue) -> recovery succeeds and paints.
HEAL - outer narration after generate_a2ui returns the healed surface (matched by the emit's unique toolCallId).

response.content: The first render came back malformed — I recovered and painted your quarterly revenue tile.

fixtures._comment: HEAL - outer agent emits generate_a2ui (matched by the unique prompt).
EXHAUST - inner render_a2ui: structurally INVALID on every attempt (unresolved child) -> recovery exhausts.
EXHAUST - outer narration after generate_a2ui returns the recovery-exhausted envelope (matched by the emit's unique toolCallId).

response.content: I couldn't produce a valid surface after several attempts — showing a graceful fallback instead.

fixtures._comment: EXHAUST - outer agent emits generate_a2ui (matched by the unique prompt).
